subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-19 in Los Angeles
subcodes.first_line: Welcome! Welcome! Are you all well? Are you all happy? I am very happy to see you all. I have come from a far distant point to see you
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @universal peace; world unity, @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
